summary: Iteration 35: Comprehensive testing of Processor ID deep-link features for admin Orders & Subscriptions. All 18 backend tests pass (100%). All 13 frontend UI verification checks pass (100%). Features tested: deep-link rendering, edit dialog processor_id field, audit trail logging, ExternalLink icon, GoCardless/Stripe URL logic.

issues: Persistent console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - caused by Emergent framework VE wrapper, not application code. Non-blocking. Confirmed non-fixable at app level (as noted in review_request).

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly and working end-to-end.

getProcessorLink helper in both OrdersTab.tsx and SubscriptionsTab.tsx correctly maps all 7 prefix types: pi_/ch_->stripe/payments, sub_->stripe/subscriptions, cus_->stripe/customers, in_->stripe/invoices, PM->gocardless/payments, MD->gocardless/mandates, SB->gocardless/subscriptions
Orders table Processor ID cell: blue badge with ExternalLink icon for known prefixes, grey badge for unknown, '—' for empty
Subscriptions table Processor ID cell: fallback chain processor_id || stripe_subscription_id || gocardless_mandate_id
Edit dialogs: data-testid='admin-order-processor-input' and data-testid='admin-sub-processor-input' correctly present and pre-filled
ExternalLink icon next to processor_id input dynamically appears/updates as user types
Backend OrderUpdate and SubscriptionUpdate models include processor_id: Optional[str] = None
update_order and update_subscription routes both record processor_id changes in audit log with {old, new} format
Audit logs correctly show processor_id changes in the 'updated' action details under 'changes' key
seed_data_creation: Backend tests modified processor_id values for testing; restored order AA-9C79248E to 'ch_updated_processor_ui' and subscription to 'PM01TMJT9AV057'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 fully tested Processor ID deep-link features. Summary of verified behavior: (1) Orders table: Processor ID column at index 6 (after Sub #), data-testid=admin-order-processor-{id}, shows blue ExternalLink badge for pi_/ch_/sub_/PM/MD/SB prefixes, '—' for empty. Order AA-9C79248E originally had pi_test123456, was edited to ch_updated_processor_ui during testing. (2) Subscriptions table: Processor ID at index 2 (after Sub #), data-testid=admin-sub-processor-{id}. First subscription (SUB-6F532ACA) now has PM01TMJT9AV057. (3) Both edit dialogs have processor_id input with ExternalLink icon that updates dynamically. (4) Audit logs show processor_id change with old/new values. (5) React hydration warning from Emergent VE wrapper - non-fixable, non-blocking.

feature_test_results.Audit log - processor_id change recorded: PASS - confirmed via UI and backend tests
